from app.speaker import SpeakerProcessor
from app.config import load_config
import numpy as np

config = load_config\(\)
config['speaker']['enabled'] = True
proc = SpeakerProcessor\(config\)

audio = np.random.randint\(-1000, 1000, 16000 * 5, dtype=np.int16\)
emb = proc.extract_embedding\(audio\)
assert emb.shape == \(192,\), f'Expected \(192,\), got {emb.shape}'
print\(f'PASS: embedding shape = {emb.shape}, dtype = {emb.dtype}'\)

result = proc.identify\(audio\)
assert result.speaker_id == 'unknown'
print\(f'PASS: identify returns unknown \(score={result.confidence:.4f}\)'\)
" 2>&1)

import sounddevice as sd
devices = sd.query_devices\(\)
for i, d in enumerate\(devices\):
    if d['max_input_channels'] > 0:
        name = d['name'].encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\).decode\('utf-8'\)
        print\(f'  [{i}] {name} \(inputs={d[\\"max_input_channels\\"]}, sr={d[\\"default_samplerate\\"]}\)'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Default input index: {sd.default.device[0]}'\)
" 2>&1)
